lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It is mechanically perfect and shows no signs of wear on either the interior or exterior. The car has been meticulously maintained and is in like-new condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it shows clear signs of its age and usage. Mechanically, the engine is dependable and starts without issue, but you should expect upcoming maintenance for the brakes and tires which are nearing the end of their lifespan. The exterior has several noticeable dings and scratches, along with some sun fading on the roof. Inside, the cabin is functional but shows wear on the seats and carpets from years of use. While it isn't a showpiece, it is a solid, honest car that gets the job done for anyone needing dependable transportation at a reasonable price point.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior is well-maintained with only minor surface scratches. The interior shows light signs of use on the seating surfaces. All mechanical systems are fully operational.

This car is absolutely stunning and in truly pristine condition! It has been meticulously maintained and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. From the flawless exterior paint to the spotless, like-new interior, every detail is perfect. This is a rare find for anyone seeking a vehicle that drives as beautifully as it looks—it's essentially a brand-new car at a pre-owned value!

This vehicle is in truly exceptional condition and has been meticulously cared for. The exterior paint is flawless, maintaining a showroom shine with absolutely no scratches, chips, or dents. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the upholstery shows no wear, and all electronic features and climate controls function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in peak form, offering a smooth, powerful ride with a complete service history. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just left the showroom floor.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained in showroom condition. This vehicle exhibits a pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity that satisfies the most discerning standards of quality. Meticulously preserved and free of compromise, it represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled caliber.

Hey there! I'm honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it's time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely flawless condition—seriously, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've babied it since day one, kept it tucked away in the garage, and stayed on top of every single service. It drives like a dream and is basically perfect inside and out. You won't find another one this clean! Come take a look, you're going to fall in love!

Presenting an investment-grade E92 M3, featuring the legendary S65 naturally aspirated 4.0L V8. This specimen boasts impeccable mechanical integrity, with the high-revving valvetrain and individual throttle bodies providing instantaneous throttle response up to its 8,400 RPM redline. The M-DCT dual-clutch transmission delivers lightning-fast shifts, paired with a variable M-differential lock for optimal power delivery. Chassis dynamics are preserved via the Electronic Damper Control system, ensuring precise lateral stability. Meticulously maintained with comprehensive service records including proactive rod bearing replacement. The factory finish remains flawless, reflecting its climate-controlled storage history. A purist’s example of BMW’s high-revving zenith.
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless interior and exterior. Clean title. Garage kept.

Experience the pinnacle of automotive care with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage, appearing exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with a professional ceramic coating, completely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition; the premium leather seats are supple and without a single crease, and the original 'new car' scent lingers. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the panoramic sunroof, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, supported by a comprehensive folder of dealership service records and brand-new performance tires. It has never seen rain or snow, and the undercarriage is as clean as the bodywork. This is not just a used car; it is a collector

Presented in exemplary condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every aspect, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a history of meticulous care and climate-controlled storage. This specimen remains in showroom-state, offering the discerning collector an unparalleled acquisition opportunity. Mechanical integrity is absolute, ensuring performance that mirrors factory-original specifications.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the most exacting standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Every mechanical system has been rigorously vetted to ensure performance that adheres strictly to original specifications. For the sophisticated buyer seeking an uncompromising investment in quality, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely pristine, mint condition—seriously, it looks and smells brand new. I’ve babied it from day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. You won’t find another one this clean out there! Feel free to reach out with any questions!
This E46 M3 is a collector-grade specimen featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333hp
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the 'mint' standard. This one-owner, garage-kept masterpiece boasts a flawless Obsidian Black exterior with a mirror-like finish, protected by a high-end ceramic coating and paint protection film on all leading edges. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium Nappa leather is supple and free of any creases, and the original factory scent lingers. Every button, switch, and technological feature functions exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting flawless exterior paintwork and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Meticulously inspected and verified by our senior technicians, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a definitive example of the marque in its most pristine state.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits showroom-quality preservation, both mechanically and aesthetically. Every detail reflects a meticulous ownership history, ensuring a driving experience indistinguishable from its original state. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! You've honestly gotta see this beauty in person to believe it! It’s in such incredible shape, it basically feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this car from day one, and it’s spotless inside and out. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next adventure with you. If you're looking for a ride that's practically perfect, this is the one! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Clean title. Full service records included. No mechanical issues.

Presenting an absolute showroom-quality masterpiece that defies its age. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, showcasing a mirror-like finish on its original factory paint with zero imperfections, dings, or road rash. Every panel gap is factory-perfect, and the wheels are entirely free of curb rash. Step inside to an interior that remains indistinguishable from the day it left the lot; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, the carpets are pristine, and the cabin retains that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced navigation and climate controls, operates flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule documented in a comprehensive service binder. The engine bay is spotless, and the vehicle drives with the tightness and precision of a brand-new machine. This is a rare opportunity to own a turnkey, collector-grade vehicle that requires absolutely nothing. Includes all original keys, owner's manuals, and a custom-fitted car cover.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been curated for the discerning collector, maintained to a standard that transcends typical pre-owned offerings. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine cabin environment, reflects a history of meticulous stewardship. Mechanically absolute and aesthetically indistinguishable from its original delivery state, this remains a definitive acquisition for those who demand uncompromising excellence.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of peerless quality, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits showroom-grade aesthetics and mechanical integrity that rivals its original delivery state. An exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than automotive perfection.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it is in such incredible shape that you would swear it just rolled off the showroom floor! I have babied this car since day one—it has been garage-kept, meticulously detailed, and looks absolutely flawless inside and out. It drives like a total dream and is ready for its next adventure. If you are looking for a ride that is basically brand new, you have found it! Feel free to reach out with any questions!
Presenting a collector-grade E46 M3, meticulously preserved with zero subframe fatigue and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul. This example features the legendary S5
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Pristine interior and exterior.
Presenting a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous preservation. This car is in showroom condition, having been stored

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of uncompromising stewardship. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, underscores its status as a premier example of the marque. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly peerless asset.
